{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322080215C94A2C3A719A0D75FEE1"}"},"total":4149},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7328807804005188414","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"相当好看
前期轻松些愉快乐子多（疯批男主乐子多），但该说不说还是藏了很多伏笔在里面。后面的世界观真是大的让人难以想象而且情节也是动人心弦（切真）真心推荐自行一赏
无论是渐进式的剧情还是搞笑且爽感十足的情节都让我认为愈发好看，看到后面情节爆点直接让我震惊（一串串的伏笔爆炸）。而且作为在番茄里的小说：完整的世界，流畅的设定，易懂的文笔是能完爆其他小说的，再加上主角的性格设定很恰合现今青年人，我觉得不愧为之神作！属于那种爽快但绝不盲目，乐子又包含内容的值得坚持的小说
仅代表我看到现在的感受，希望作者能坚持下去不负以往的精彩手笔，作为读者也将持续陪伴"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1706373389,"group_id":"7290486957614828544","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"口味看书，偶尔写写书评的男大","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6wP3Q6/6T4Wwa2WNq6Ps0w0a9f6LbMKlCzuhQqnjEt+","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/f7ac9d81468945878cac8d410c3c7789~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776706955&x-signature=XRPhAsxR2GER6V3klotYf76MBQE%3D","user_id":"1399024884384654","user_name":"南影北楚"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1399024884384654","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1743756556,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7290486957614828544","book_info":{"abstract":"【无系统】+【无女主】+【克苏鲁】+【无套路】（本书又名：序列：登神）
暗狱与现实相融合，诡异生物透过‘门’侵扰现世。
一个组织悄然诞生，他们自称守狱人。
他们将诡异挡在‘门’外，将跑到现世的诡异生物抓捕并收容。
陆笑偶然间坠落暗狱，独自在暗狱生活了三年。
被守狱人组织发现后带离暗狱，成为了一名带编制的S级收容物。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9e5b2785a9519b8199f2f414f7bacafa","author":"逸臣","author_id":"","book_id":"7290486957614828544","book_name":"邪神牧场","book_short_name":"序列：登神","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#081830","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"10.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":705,"name":"克苏鲁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=705&name=克苏鲁&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":841,"name":"群像","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=841&name=群像&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7290487567470985743","read_count":"101298","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"3201663"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"1571","tags":"都市高武,都市,无女主,克苏鲁,无后宫,群像","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/6a03112c8481b4fdf688ac981fc3fdd4~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779321735&x-signature=Ndpqvm%2B1HAr7y1t1dJ%2FcfcAqt%2Bo%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4455657606753197","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"343"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322080215C94A2C3A719A0D75FEE1"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读14小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":44,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":50249,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":74123},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7300996004907500303","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"题材不算新颖，但是写出了一个新的高度，而且文笔很好，搞笑的地方很自然一点不显得“冷”。伏笔埋的也都不错让人有一种想看下去的感觉，这种感觉很重要，不像有些小说可看可不看都好。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1699899699,"group_id":"7290486957614828544","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"从看小说到写小说中间的跨越是很艰难的，我想试试。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5fnpMkG97SUaSkBOdQB3KE=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/7919630d0b8a43ca9016f40a6f036631~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776709564&x-signature=zU0aEPX1cDxsBaCQZYXYW81krTY%3D","user_id":"5515603267","user_name":"当你不怕孤单"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"5515603267","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7290486957614828544","book_info":{"abstract":"【无系统】+【无女主】+【克苏鲁】+【无套路】（本书又名：序列：登神）

一个组织悄然诞生，他们自称守狱人。
他们将诡异挡在‘门’外，将跑到现世的诡异生物抓捕并收容。

":36,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":15028,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":58264},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7309121308447507254","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常非常的好啊，逻辑这方面先不谈，他在逻辑方面已经碾压绝大部分番茄书虽然世界观没有展开导致看的有点儿难受（没写几章这也可能是导致世界观没有展开的原因），但对剧情的描写还是比较充沛的。情节也是环环相扣，除了主角有点儿神经病以外这本书还有很多看点当然主角神经病也是一个新颖的人设——看的更带劲。
比爽文更爽文，但不无脑。
比生活文更文，但是不生活（只是为了对称
比刺激的文章更带劲（当然内容不会像某书一样被封禁常常封，嗯，那本书中期很黄前期氛围到位嗯，后期的话猜到之后自行体会
...）
这本书要是按照目前这个标准来写概率（注意是概率有可能还是王.抽奖的概率）成为下一本跟斩神一样的书。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1701788236,"group_id":"7290486957614828544","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"好耍，好耍","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3bHkig0x7KuDIDP3P17aWE=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/d53237e992a848f8a799ff09fb07814e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776706910&x-signature=ipVxw5%2Bxw7Ueyrc2IZJqP2HRoJw%3D","user_id":"97851200964","user_name":"白板乐子人"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"97851200964","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7290486957614828544","book_info":{"abstract":"【无系统】+【无女主】+【克苏鲁】+【无套路】（本书又名：序列：登神）
